hero.subtitle: Marketing that generates demand. Technology that supports growth. Sales that close. Fully integrated, one team, one partner.

problem.headline: You've been through this before.
problem.subline: You hired a marketing agency that doesn't understand tech. A dev who doesn't understand business. A salesperson with no process. In the end, you became the project manager of 5 vendors who don't talk to each other — and results are half of what they could be.
problem.item1_desc: Investment in traffic, posts, and campaigns that generate likes — but not real clients. No funnel, no tracking, no idea what works.
problem.item2_desc: Slow website, systems that don't integrate, data scattered across spreadsheets. Tech should accelerate — but it became a bottleneck.
problem.item3_desc: Leads come in and get lost. The sales team relies on memory and WhatsApp. No CRM, no automated follow-up, no predictability.
problem.footer: The problem isn't lack of effort. It's lack of integration.

big_idea.headline: What if everything worked together?
big_idea.subline: Marketing, IT, and Sales. One team.
big_idea.description: When marketing feeds the CRM, the CRM triggers follow-up, and technology sustains it all with stability — the result is different. No gaps. No rework. No blaming another vendor. That's what Respect does: integrates the three areas that move your business.

pilares.headline: EVERYTHING YOU NEED.
pilares.subline: Each area works independently, but when integrated, results multiply.
pilares.subline_strong: See what we deliver in each:

marketing.title: GENERATE QUALIFIED DEMAND
marketing.description: Paid traffic, SEO, conversion funnels, landing pages, strategic content, and email automation. All tracked, all measurable, all results-focused.

ti.title: BUILD THE FOUNDATION
ti.description: High-performance websites, custom web systems, platform integrations, cloud, DevOps, and proactive maintenance. Technology that frees your business to grow.

vendas.title: CLOSE MORE AND BETTER
vendas.description: AI chatbots on WhatsApp, configured and integrated CRM, sales playbooks, team training, and pipeline dashboards. Sales with process, not luck.

explanation.headline: It's not magic.
explanation.subline: Every project starts with diagnostic and ends with measurement. In between: strategy, execution, and continuous optimization. No guesswork, no surprises — you follow every step and every result in real time.

autoridade.headline: RESULTS SPEAK
autoridade.subline: We don't ask you to believe in us. We ask you to look at the facts: proven experience, multidisciplinary team, and a work model that delivers.
autoridade.revenue_headline: One team. Three areas. Zero silos.

stats.anos_desc: Real execution in marketing, technology, and sales projects for companies of all sizes.
stats.pilares_desc: Marketing, IT, and Sales working together — no outsourcing pieces, no losing control.
stats.resultados_desc: Every delivery is tracked. If it doesn't generate measurable results, we adjust until it does.
stats.suporte_desc: Active project follow-up. We don't disappear after delivery — we stay with you.

faq.headline: Questions
faq.a1: Depends on the scope. Every project is different — that's why we start with a free diagnostic to understand your situation and build a tailored proposal. No generic packages.
faq.q2: How soon will I see results?
faq.a2: Depends on the area. Paid traffic generates results in the first weeks. SEO and content, in 3-6 months. Custom software, based on complexity. In all cases, you track progress in real time.
faq.q3: Do I need to hire all 3 areas?
faq.a3: No. Each pillar works independently. But when integrated, results multiply — because everything connects: marketing feeds sales, and IT supports both.
faq.q4: Do you work with small companies?
faq.a4: Yes. We work with companies of all sizes — what matters is having a clear goal and willingness to invest in growth. If you're looking for serious results, we can help.
faq.q5: I've had bad experiences with agencies. Why would this be different?
faq.a5: Because most agencies only do marketing and outsource everything else. Here, marketing, technology, and sales are on the same team. No telephone game, no blaming another vendor. The result is our responsibility — entirely.
faq.a6: Book a free diagnostic. In 30 minutes we understand your situation, identify opportunities, and present an actionable plan. No commitment — if it makes sense for you, we move forward.

cta_final.headline: YOUR NEXT STEP
cta_final.subline: A free 30-minute diagnostic. We understand your business, identify opportunities, and build an action plan. No commitment, no fluff.

scarcity.headline: Every client gets our full attention.
scarcity.subline: To guarantee quality delivery and real follow-up, we work with a limited number of projects at a time. If there's availability, we start fast. If not, you join our priority waitlist.

pilar_detalhe.services_sub: Each service is implemented with methodology, professional tools, and ongoing follow-up.
pilar_detalhe.ideal_title: This service is for you if:
pilar_detalhe.outros_sub: Marketing, IT, and Sales — each one strengthens the other.

marketing.title: Marketing that Generates Demand
marketing.tagline: Traffic, funnels, content, and automation — all tracked, all results-focused.
marketing.description: We implement the complete digital marketing operation: from acquisition strategy to nurturing and conversion. Google Ads, Meta Ads, SEO, email marketing, optimized landing pages, and dashboards with real data. Every dollar invested is tracked to the final result.
marketing.msg: Hello! I'm interested in Respect's Digital Marketing services. I'd like to book a free diagnostic.
marketing.ideal_for: Companies investing in marketing but unable to track returns. Businesses that need predictable qualified lead generation. Brands that want to move beyond 'posting for the sake of posting' and have a real acquisition strategy.

s1.title: Paid Traffic (Google, Meta, LinkedIn)
s1.desc: Optimized campaigns with advanced targeting, remarketing, and continuous ROAS optimization.

s2.title: Conversion Funnels
s2.desc: Landing pages, smart forms, and nurturing sequences that turn visitors into leads and leads into customers.

s3.title: SEO & Strategic Content
s3.desc: Keyword research, optimized content production, and link building strategy to dominate organic results.

s4.title: Email Marketing & Automation
s4.desc: Automated welcome, nurture, reactivation, and sales sequences — integrated with CRM.

s5.title: Analytics & Dashboards
s5.desc: GA4, Pixel, Tag Manager configured. Real-time dashboards with the metrics that matter for your business.

s6.title: Strategic Social Media
s6.desc: Content planning, post management, and performance analysis. Content that positions, not just fills a grid.

deliverables.d1: Monthly strategic planning with execution calendar
deliverables.d4: Monthly reports with real data and recommendations

outcomes.o1: Measurable and continuously decreasing acquisition cost
outcomes.o4: Clear ROI visibility in each channel

ti.title: Technology that Supports Growth
ti.tagline: Custom software, cloud, DevOps, and maintenance — the foundation that doesn't break.
ti.description: We develop and maintain the technology infrastructure your business needs to operate and grow: high-performance websites, custom web systems, APIs, platform integrations, scalable cloud, and ongoing support. Technology that works.
ti.msg: Hello! I'm interested in Respect's IT & Infrastructure services. I'd like to book a free diagnostic.
ti.ideal_for: Companies that depend on technology to operate and need stability. Businesses that want to move from spreadsheets to a custom system. Operations that need to integrate tools that currently don't talk to each other.

s1.title: Custom Web & Mobile Software
s1.desc: Applications built for your process — no forced adaptations to generic solutions.

s2.title: DevOps & CI/CD
s2.desc: Automated pipelines, continuous deployment, and staging environments for fast, secure deliveries.

s3.title: Cloud & Infrastructure
s3.desc: AWS, GCP, or VPS — scalable, monitored, and highly available.

s4.title: Professional UI/UX
s4.desc: Interfaces that work: design system, responsiveness, accessibility, and consistent experience.

s5.title: Proactive Maintenance & Support
s5.desc: Monitoring, updates, and ongoing support — without waiting for things to break.

s6.title: Integrations & APIs
s6.desc: Connection between ERPs, CRMs, payment gateways, and any system your business uses.

deliverables.d3: Monitoring with uptime and performance alerts
deliverables.d6: Security and load testing before go-live

vendas.title: Sales with Process, Not Luck
vendas.tagline: AI chatbots, CRM, playbooks, and training — predictable pipeline.
vendas.description: We structure your company's sales process: AI chatbots on WhatsApp that qualify 24/7, CRM configured and integrated with marketing, tested sales playbooks, and practical team training. Result: more predictability, more conversion, less waste.
vendas.msg: Hello! I'm interested in Respect's Sales & Commercial services. I'd like to book a free diagnostic.
vendas.ideal_for: Companies with sales teams that want to sell more with process. B2B businesses that need pipeline predictability. Operations that receive leads but can't convert consistently.

s1.title: WhatsApp AI Chatbots
s1.desc: Automated service, lead qualification, and scheduling via WhatsApp Business with AI.

s2.title: CRM: Setup & Training
s2.desc: Complete configuration of HubSpot, Pipedrive, or RD Station — with automations and hands-on training.

s3.title: Sales Consulting
s3.desc: Funnel diagnosis, bottleneck identification, and action plan to increase conversion.

s4.title: Sales Playbooks
s4.desc: Scripts, objection handling, prospecting cadences — all documented and tested.

s5.title: CRM ↔ Marketing Integration
s5.desc: Lead enters through marketing, lands in CRM, triggers automatic follow-up — no one gets lost.

s6.title: Pipeline Dashboards
s6.desc: Conversion per stage, revenue forecast, and team metrics — full visibility.

deliverables.d1: Chatbot configured and live on WhatsApp
deliverables.d4: CRM configured with automations and integrations

outcomes.o1: 30-50% shorter sales cycle with automated qualification
outcomes.o4: Sales team with clear, documented process
